falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises by 10% above the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the pattern's historical bottom behavior, invalidating the 'similar to bottom_2022_may_luna' assumption and proving the HOLD signal incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current UNKNOWN verdict and proving the pattern's validity is flawed.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical bottom pattern would invalidate the core basis of the current analysis, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
